meta.question: Is there any parallelism in this model? (Model ID: 5a8e825c3a9a4049b67ab53c2ba7abc8)
meta.finalAnswer:
Yes, there is parallelism in the model with ID 5a8e825c3a9a4049b67ab53c2ba7abc8. The model contains two ParallelGateway elements:
1. https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-C71FEAF2-3D3C-437A-B525-DC74CA9C7254
2. https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-208E1A4A-B96E-4DB9-9708-D308C4FADB28

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?element ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?element tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?definitions .
  ?definitions tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model tai:originalId "5a8e825c3a9a4049b67ab53c2ba7abc8" .
  ?element a ?type .
  FILTER(?type IN (bboExt:ParallelGateway))
  OPTIONAL { ?element bbo:name ?name . }
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The query successfully identified two ParallelGateway elements within the specified model, confirming the presence of parallelism.
